summary: Rule chunk from Paranoia for Players page 15, chunk 2.

mechanics.raw_text:
Interrogation: How to extract useful information from Commie mutant scum, 
Intimidation: This doesn’t exactly ingratiate you with your inferiors, but it does get their Cooperation. Motivation: Leadership; gets people heading {in the right direction and even thinking it’s ood idea 
Oratory: How to get a bunch of people to do what you want 
Psychescan: Basically, use this to tr to figure ‘out whether someone's lying or not. Spurious Logic: Con doesn't work with ‘computers and bot, ‘cause they're too logical 
Instead, you have to build a completely logical construct on fallacious or incomplete assump- tions to get them to do what you want. Doing so is a skill all its own. Just ask Mr. Spock. Dexteri 
Energy, Field, Laser, and Projectile Weapons: Skills that let you use different types of ‘weapons, You also use these skills when your ‘weapon breaks and you try to fix it 
Primitive Missile Weapons: Like “primitive ‘melee weapons,’ but applying to bows, arows, rocks, beer bottles, and so on. Vehicle Aimed, Field and Launched Weapons: Skills that fet you use weapons mounted on vehicles, 
Wl Mechanical Skills, Habitat Engineering: Knowledge of the air, ‘communications, transpon,, power, water and ‘waste systems used in Alpha Complex, Mighty handy when you need to find a ventilation shaft or something to escape incoming fire 
Robot Operation and Maintenance: These skills are broken down by robot type, Basically, they’te how to use and repair bots 
Vehicle Operation and Maintenance: Ditto, for vehicles, 
Wl Moxie skills 
Biochemical Therapy: How to ensure wakefulness, sleepiness, happiness or any. fother mental state through the application of litle pill. Demo!
